name: 0.05% Tretinoin Cream USP
about: 0.05% Tretinoin Cream USP is a highly effective topical medication for treating acne and reducing the appearance of fine lines, wrinkles, and uneven skin tone. Formulated with 0.05% Tretinoin, this cream works by increasing cell turnover and stimulating collagen production, resulting in clearer, smoother, and more youthful-looking skin. The cream is easy to use and suitable for all skin types. Its white color and creamy texture make it easy to apply and absorb quickly into the skin. It comes in a convenient tube that can be easily stored in a dry place.

faq.q: What is 0.05% Tretinoin Cream USP used for?
faq.a: 0.05% Tretinoin Cream USP is used for treating acne and reducing the appearance of fine lines, wrinkles, and uneven skin tone.

faq.q: Is this cream suitable for all skin types?
faq.a: Yes, this cream is suitable for all skin types.

faq.q: How do I use this cream?
faq.a: Apply a small amount of cream to clean, dry skin once a day at bedtime. Avoid contact with eyes, lips, and mucous membranes.

faq.q: Can I use this cream if I am pregnant or breastfeeding?
faq.a: It is not recommended to use this cream if you are pregnant or breastfeeding. Consult your doctor before use.
No, this cream is not disposable. It comes in a tube that can be used multiple times.
